summary: Completed testing of Iteration 5 features: Shared room mode behavior (parallel_all/parallel_paired), context mode selector, reload persistence bug fix, and send controls. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all new features functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Scene tab Context Mode selector properly switches between 'Compartmented' and 'Shared room'
Shared Room Mode card only appears when context_mode='shared' - conditional rendering works correctly
Shared Room Mode dropdown offers 'parallel_all' and 'parallel_paired' options
Auto pairing preview shows correct model pairings when parallel_paired is selected
Backend accepts shared_room_mode and shared_pairs payloads without 422/500 errors
Reload persistence fix working - messages persisted during streaming via progressive DB updates
Conversation sync endpoint returns both user and assistant messages for reload recovery
Enter key adds newline, Ctrl+Enter to send hint visible in textarea placeholder
Chat streaming works with gpt-4o/gpt-5.2 (universal key models)
seed_data_creation: Created test conversations via /api/chat/stream with shared_room_mode and shared_pairs payloads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features all verified: (1) Context Mode selector in Scene tab switches between Compartmented and Shared room, (2) When 'Shared room' selected, Shared Room Mode card appears with parallel_all/parallel_paired dropdown, (3) parallel_paired mode shows auto pairing preview with model pairs, (4) Backend processes shared_room_mode and shared_pairs without 422/500 errors, (5) Reload persistence bug fixed - assistant messages now persisted during streaming and recovered via conversation sync endpoint, (6) Send controls working: Enter adds newline, send button functional.

details: Backend now progressively persists assistant messages during streaming
Messages saved to DB with streaming=true flag during stream, updated to streaming=false on complete
syncConversationMessages() in frontend fetches messages from server on page load/reload
